_instructions: EDIT ME, NOT THE HTML. Change any text between quotes below and save the file. Do not delete commas or quotation marks. To add a new item to a list (like a testimonial or gallery photo), copy an existing block between { and }, paste it before or after, and edit the text inside it. Images are referenced by URL - replace the 'image' values with a link to your own photo (upload photos to your website's /images folder or use a link from Google Drive/Dropbox set to 'anyone with link can view').

site.name: Naioth Ramah Centre
site.tagline: A place of gathering, in Nyamata

hero.headline: Still waters, gathered people.
hero.subheadline: Naioth Ramah Centre is a serene lakeside-inspired venue in Nyamata, built for weddings, conferences, retreats and every celebration that deserves room to breathe.

about.title: A quiet centre with room for big occasions
paragraphs: Naioth Ramah Centre sits just outside Nyamata town in Bugesera, a district known for its wetlands and calm. We built the Centre around that same stillness — open lawns, covered pavilions and light-filled halls that hold anywhere from an intimate ceremony to a thousand-guest celebration.

Whether it's a wedding, a church convocation, a corporate retreat or a family milestone, our grounds and our team are set up to carry the day from first arrival to final toast, without you having to manage the details yourself.

features.title: Flexible capacity
features.text: From 50 guests in our garden pavilion to 1,000+ in the main hall.

features.title: Full-service catering
features.text: In-house kitchen serving local and international menus.

features.title: On-site parking
features.text: Secure parking for over 200 vehicles, with dedicated staff.

features.title: Sound, light & stage
features.text: Professional AV equipment included with every hall booking.

spaces.title: Five settings, one calm centre
spaces.subtitle: Every space opens onto the gardens, so guests are never far from open air.

items.name: The Main Hall
items.description: Our largest indoor hall, ideal for weddings, conferences and large church gatherings, with a raised stage and full AV setup.

items.name: The Garden Pavilion
items.description: A covered, open-air pavilion set among the lawns — the favourite choice for outdoor weddings and receptions.

items.name: The Lakeview Terrace
items.description: An intimate terrace for ceremonies, cocktail hours and smaller receptions, named for its view over the water gardens.

items.name: The Conference Room
items.description: A quieter, air-conditioned room for board meetings, seminars and workshops, with high-speed internet included.

items.name: The Chapel Lawn
items.description: An open lawn beneath mature trees, set up for outdoor services, ordinations and open-air celebrations.

events.title: Built for every kind of gathering

items.title: Weddings
items.text: Ceremony, reception and everything between, on grounds designed to photograph beautifully at any hour.

items.title: Church events
items.text: Conventions, convocations and crusades, with capacity and sound built for large congregations.

items.title: Corporate & conferences
items.text: Meetings, seminars and retreats, with reliable power, internet and quiet working spaces.

items.title: Family celebrations
items.text: Introductions, birthdays, anniversaries and memorials, hosted with the same care as any wedding.

images.caption: The Main Hall, set for a wedding reception
Evening light over the Garden Pavilion
The water gardens near the Lakeview Terrace
Guests gathered on the Chapel Lawn

items.quote: Our wedding at the Garden Pavilion felt effortless. The team handled everything and the grounds photographed beautifully at golden hour.
items.name: Aline & Eric

items.quote: We ran a three-day church convention in the Main Hall and never once worried about sound or seating. The staff anticipated everything.
items.name: Pastor Jean de Dieu

items.quote: Quiet, professional and close enough to Kigali for our whole team to attend. The Conference Room made our retreat easy to run.
items.name: Grace M.

contact.title: Let's talk about your date
contact.subtitle: Tell us the occasion, the guest count and the date you have in mind, and our events team will reply within one business day.
contact.address: Naioth Ramah Centre, Nyamata, Bugesera District, Eastern Province, Rwanda
contact.formNote: This form opens your email app with the details pre-filled — no data is stored on this website.

footer.note: Naioth Ramah Centre — a serene space for all kinds of events and celebrations.
